
<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

# Rpackage

<!-- badges: start -->

<!-- badges: end -->

This R package was created to experiment with the R creation process and
simplify the import of DNA sequenes, translation of DNA sequences and
reversal of DNA sequences.

## Installation

You can install the development version of Rpackage from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("ADC-405-S26/DNAtranslate")
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how import a DNA sequence,
reverse it, and then translate it into proteins.

``` r
library(DNAtranslate)
# import a .txt file formatted as followed 
# >Sequence Name
# ATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGC
# ATGCATGCATGC...
sequencesDF <- readSequences("data-raw/exampleSequences.txt")
head(sequencesDF)
#>                            name
#> 1   HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype
#> 2 LT2 (wild-type) HisD Genotype
#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   sequence
#> 1  
#> 2 
```

``` r
library(DNAtranslate)
# take that previously created DF and flip a specified sequence
reverse <- reverseSequence(exampleSequences, "HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype")
head(reverse)
#>                            name
#> 1   HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype
#> 2 LT2 (wild-type) HisD Genotype
#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   sequence
#> 1  
#> 2 
# now the sequence with the name "HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype" is flipped
```

``` r
library(DNAtranslate)
# add a new column to the sequence DF with the protein sequence that corresponds with the DNA sequence
proteinSequence <- translateDNA(exampleSequences, offset = 0)
head(proteinSequence)
#>                            name
#> 1   HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype
#> 2 LT2 (wild-type) HisD Genotype
#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   sequence
#> 1  
#> 2 
#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              protein
#> 1 *APVV*L*PKI*RSASPSLISMGRNT*SSRRAMRAIWWMRLPAQARYFSATGRRNPPVITLPEPTMFYRPMAILLPVPALG*RISRNG*PFRNCRKRAFPLWHQPLKHWRRQNV*PPIKMP*PCA*TPSRSKH
#> 2 
```
